items.name: Exclusive Elaine Neckless

Exclusive Elaine Neckless

Colar Elaine Exclusivo
Um colar dourado delicado e elegante, feito para alguém especial. Com acabamento em brilho PBR detalhado, ele traz um toque de sofisticação e elegância a qualquer visual. Uma peça simples, porém belíssima, criada para se destacar com estilo.

Fabricado por Exclusive Designs

Exclusive Elaine Necklace
A soft and elegant gold necklace made for someone who means a lot. Crafted with detailed PBR shine, it brings a warm and classy glow to any avatar. A simple yet beautiful piece designed to stand out with style.

Made by Exclusive Designs

items.name: Celestial Commander Coat [PBR]
items.description:
✨⚔️ Armor of Light, Worn with Honor ⚔️✨
Step into the role of a divine leader with the Celestial Commander Coat. Crafted in radiant white with golden accents, this majestic outfit combines the authority of a commander with the purity of a holy knight. Flowing panels and intricate details make it a perfect choice for roleplay, fantasy battles, or anyone who seeks to shine with honor.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Detailed PBR textures for a realistic, noble finish
Gold-trimmed design adds luxury and divine flair
Long ceremonial coat for commanding presence
Perfect for roleplay as paladins, generals, or angelic warriors
🔍 Keywords: holy knight, celestial coat, commander outfit, fantasy roleplay, divine armor, white robe, gold trim, Roblox clothing, PBR outfit
⚡ Rule the battlefield with the strength of justice and the glow of divinity.

items.name: Midnight Flow Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🖤 Elegant • Dramatic • Timeless
This coat drapes like a story — a flowing black silhouette that feels both mysterious and graceful. Its long cut moves naturally, almost like it’s alive with every step, while the subtle worn edges give it depth and character. Sleek leather-like textures add a modern touch, making it perfect for avatars who want to stand out with quiet confidence.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
🖤 Long, flowing design for dramatic movement
✨ PBR textures that give the fabric a realistic sheen
🧵 Detailed stitching & natural folds for authenticity
🌌 A look that works for fantasy, urban, or cinematic roleplay
🎮 Versatile style — cool, mysterious, but never harsh
